title: Maths words
instruction: Match each word to its meaning.

pairs.definition: A part of a whole number, e.g. 1/2
A number with a point, e.g. 0.5
A number out of 100, shown with %
1/2 — one part out of two equal parts
1/4 — one part out of four equal parts
The top number in a fraction
The bottom number in a fraction
